description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push and pull request events to the dev branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test against Python 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10. Check out the repository, set up a netrc file for Earthdata credentials, create a Micromamba environment with ARIA-tools, and then run a test script within that environment using the TOPOAPI key from secrets.
